overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a desert highway at dusk, crossing the road, and exploring the arid terrain toward an industrial complex in the distance. The scene features warm sunset lighting, Joshua trees, rocky formations, and futuristic billboards.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt shoulder of a desert highway, parallel to a metal guardrail

notable_agents.action: car driving past on the highway from behind and moving away toward the horizon

entered.detail: metal guardrail running parallel to the highway with concrete posts
large metal gantry structure spanning the highway with illuminated advertising screens
mountain range silhouetted against the pink and orange sunset sky
asphalt highway with lane markings and cracks

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the dirt shoulder of a desert highway at dusk, with a metal guardrail on the right and the asphalt highway beside it. In the distance, a large overhead gantry with billboards spans the road, while mountains silhouette against the warm sunset sky. A car passes by on the highway.

events.description: character turns right and steps onto the highway asphalt to cross to the other side
silver sedan passes by at high speed while character is crossing the road

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking across the highway lanes to reach the desert side

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving past at high speed with headlights on

entered.detail: cracked asphalt surface of the highway underfoot

segments.scene_description: The character turns and crosses the highway asphalt, moving from the shoulder to the other side. A silver sedan passes by at speed as the character crosses. The overhead billboards move to the left as the perspective shifts.

events.description: location text 'BIOTECHNICA FLATS' appears on screen identifying the region

agents.ego_description: walking through desert terrain toward rocky outcrops and a large industrial complex visible in the distance

entered.detail: large reddish rock formation rising from the desert floor with layered strata
massive futuristic industrial facility with tall towers, cranes, and glowing lights
low bushes and desert vegetation scattered across the sandy terrain

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the highway, the character explores the desert terrain toward a massive industrial complex visible in the distance. Large rocky outcrops rise on the right while Joshua trees dot the landscape. The location is identified as 'Biotechnica Flats'.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert wilderness with scattered rock formations

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk through the desert landscape, navigating around bushes and rock formations while heading toward distant illuminated structures

entered.detail: illuminated advertising billboard glowing with red and white lights in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues exploring the desert wilderness, passing close to rocky formations on the right while the industrial complex shifts to the left in the distance. An illuminated billboard becomes visible ahead, and the terrain becomes more uneven with scattered vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a roadside shoulder across a desert highway and into a rugged wilderness toward a distant industrial hub. It begins with a walk along a dirt shoulder beside a metal guardrail, moving toward a large overhead gantry with billboards silhouetted against a warm sunset sky as a car passes by. As the camera turns to cross the asphalt, a silver sedan speeds past, shifting the perspective of the overhead billboards to the left. The scene then opens into the arid terrain of the Biotechnica Flats, where the camera moves past scattered Joshua trees and large rocky outcrops toward a massive industrial complex on the horizon. Finally, the path leads deeper into the uneven desert wilderness, passing close to rocky formations before an illuminated billboard emerges ahead under the fading light.
